meaning: adj.未经检查(或调查、审查)的,未经权衡的,未经核对的
examples: Usually, the lives of black women go largely unexamined.
Soupios says that it is based on Plato's observation that the unexamined life is not worth living.
The unexamined life is not worth living. — Socrates.
The psychological stasis that Adjmi captures with such skill is the bright doom of an unexamined life.
An unexamined question at the heart of this debate, then, is how people actually read the Constitution.
